KXNCAAFGAME-26SEP12OKLAMICH-MICH.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the team who wins the Oklahoma vs Michigan college football game originally scheduled for Sep 12, 2026. If the game is postponed from its originally scheduled date but begins within 48 hours, the market will remain open and resolve based on the official final result. If the game is not started within 48 hours, the market will resolve to the a fair market price.
